items.title: Enhance Timestamp Display in Roadmap 🌍
items.summary: All 'As of' timestamps, including Revenue and Recent Orders, now display in the browser's local timezone instead of raw ISO 8601 UTC strings. This change improves user experience by providing a more readable format, such as 'Mar 3, 2026, 02:13 AM' instead of the previous ISO format. The update involved modifications to the app.js file to implement the local time formatting.

items.title: Enhance CI with Recent Orders Auto-Update in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the `generate_recent_orders.py` script into the GitHub Actions workflow, ensuring that `recent_orders.json` is automatically updated every two hours. The implementation utilizes existing PGSQL secrets for seamless operation. Additionally, code formatting has been applied to `app.js` and the snapshot script for improved readability.

items.title: New API Usage Stats Section Added in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced a new **API Usage** section to the Roadmap page, showcasing per-API call volume statistics sourced from Tencent Cloud CLS logs. Key updates include a new script for querying API usage data, enhanced rendering in the app, and a stylish new table for displaying the statistics. This addition will provide valuable insights into API performance and usage trends.

items.title: Upgrade to Capacitor 7.5.0 and Android SDK 35 in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the Nexior project by upgrading Capacitor to version 7.5.0, along with the Android SDK to 35 and Gradle to 8.11.1. The minimum SDK version has been increased from 22 to 23, ensuring compatibility with the latest features. Additionally, the release signing configuration has been improved for better security and deployment.
